# SwrCacheKey.Normalize method

Normalizes a URL cache key by sorting query string parameters alphabetically. Ensures `/api/data?b=2&a=1` and `/api/data?a=1&b=2` resolve to the same cache entry.

```csharp
public static string Normalize(string url)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| url | The URL to normalize. |

## Return Value

The normalized URL with query parameters sorted alphabetically.
